name: 1St Colonial Community Bank
description_short: 1st Colonial Community Bank is an FDIC-insured community bank serving South New Jersey and Southeast Pennsylvania with over 20 years of experience, offering personal and business banking products.
description_long:
1st Colonial Community Bank is a community-focused financial institution that has been operating for more than 20 years, serving customers across South New Jersey and Southeast Pennsylvania. The bank is FDIC-insured and backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, providing federal deposit protection for customer accounts. The institution appears to operate as part of a broader banking organization, with references to Mid Penn Bank's leadership structure visible on their website.

1st Colonial offers a comprehensive suite of banking services including personal checking and savings accounts, personal and business loans, residential mortgages, credit cards for both personal and business use, and cash management services. They provide modern digital banking capabilities including online banking, mobile banking, telephone banking, eStatements, Zelle transfers, contactless payments, and debit card services with security alerts. Additionally, they offer safe deposit boxes and free coin counting services at select branch locations (Collingswood and Limerick branches).

The bank distinguishes itself as a community bank with a focus on personalized service and local market knowledge. They emphasize ease of banking through multiple access channels and maintain a physical branch presence in their service area. The bank provides financial education resources including a "Cents of Community" blog, loan applications, FDIC insurance information, security guidance, financial calculators, and FAQs.

1st Colonial Community Bank is best suited for customers seeking traditional banking services with local branch access in South New Jersey and Southeast Pennsylvania. However, the website content is limited in detail regarding specific product terms, rates, fees (beyond mention of a fee schedule), or competitive advantages. Potential customers should contact the bank directly for detailed information about specific products and pricing before making banking decisions. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal checking accounts with online and mobile banking
Residential mortgage lending and home equity products
Safe deposit boxes (Collingswood and Limerick branches)
Free coin counting (Collingswood and Limerick branches)
Digital banking with eStatements and contactless payments
pros: FDIC-insured deposits with full federal protection
Over 20 years of established community banking presence
Multiple digital banking channels including mobile app, online banking, and Zelle transfers
Comprehensive product suite covering personal, business, and mortgage lending
Free coin counting service available at branch locations
Contactless payment options and debit card security alerts included
Physical branch locations in South New Jersey and Southeast Pennsylvania for in-person service
cons: Limited branch network with only two locations specifically mentioned for certain services
Website provides minimal detail on interest rates, APRs, or specific product terms
Safe deposit boxes carry annual fees with no transparent pricing on the main pages
Limited information about business lending products and cash management service specifics
No mention of investment services, wealth management, or advanced financial planning tools
best_for: Customers in South New Jersey and Southeast Pennsylvania seeking traditional community banking with branch access
Small business owners needing business checking, lending, and cash management services
Consumers who prefer in-person banking relationships and local decision-making
Homebuyers seeking residential mortgage financing from a community-focused lender
diagnosis: 1st Colonial Community Bank is best for customers in South Jersey and Southeast PA who value local community banking with physical branch access and a comprehensive range of traditional banking products. The main caveat is that detailed product information, competitive rates, and service specifics are not clearly disclosed on their website, requiring direct contact with the bank for accurate comparisons and decision-making.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: 1st Colonial Community Bank is an FDIC-insured community bank serving South Jersey and Southeast Pennsylvania with personal and business banking.
